subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thy servant 'Ísa hath turned towards the threshold of Thy mercy and hath been attracted by the sacred fragrances of Thy divine holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک عیسی قد اقبل الی عتبه رحمانیتک و انجذب بنفحات قدس ربانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
